title: Fullstack dev — TDD & token efficiency
description: Portuguese developer's setup emphasizing code quality via TDD, token optimization with RTK CLI, and agent-driven development. Includes comprehensive best practices guide (CLAUDE.md) covering quality, token economy, and skills orchestration.
overview:
## Claude Code Setup Overview

A productivity-focused Claude Code configuration built around token efficiency, persistent memory, and structured agentic workflows.

**superpowers** provides a discipline layer of skills — brainstorming, TDD, debugging, planning, and parallel subagent dispatch — that enforce consistent workflows across sessions. **claude-mem** gives Claude cross-session memory and structural code search via AST parsing, eliminating repeated context-setting. **token-optimizer** audits context health and coaches token-efficient habits to keep sessions sharp.

**RTK (Rust Token Killer)** is a CLI proxy that rewrites common shell commands through a hook, stripping noise from output before it hits the context window — the bundle includes the hook script and its checksum. **CLAUDE.md** encodes project conventions, model routing rules, and agent best practices as standing instructions loaded every session.

**context7** pulls live library documentation on demand, keeping answers accurate regardless of training cutoffs. **frontend-design** specializes in production-quality UI generation with high design standards. **playwright** enables browser automation and end-to-end UI testing directly from the agent. **github** surfaces PR and issue workflows without leaving the terminal.

**claude-hud** renders a live status line with session metrics. **plugin-dev** provides guided workflows for building and publishing Claude Code plugins. **snapshot** lets you export, inspect, and apply this entire setup as a portable bundle. **tray-api** extends Claude with Tray.io integration for workflow automation.

Mirror this setup to get structured agentic discipline, persistent memory, and aggressive token hygiene out of the box.
